label: Expansion
description: Defines a RimWorld expansion or DLC entry, including its icon, background, store links, brand color, and linked mod package ID.

iconPath.label: Icon path
iconPath.description: Texture asset path for the expansion icon shown when the DLC is owned.

notOwnedIconPath.label: Not owned icon path
notOwnedIconPath.description: Texture asset path for the icon shown when the DLC is not owned. Falls back to the owned icon if empty.

backgroundPath.label: Background path
backgroundPath.description: Texture asset path for the expansion background image.

linkedMod.label: Linked mod
linkedMod.description: Package ID of the mod this expansion entry represents (e.g. Ludeon.RimWorld.Royalty). Lowercased automatically on load.

steamUrl.label: Steam URL
steamUrl.description: Steam store page URL for this expansion.

siteUrl.label: Site URL
siteUrl.description: Official website URL for this expansion.

previewImagesFolderPath.label: Preview images folder path
previewImagesFolderPath.description: Folder path containing preview images for this expansion.

isCore.label: Is core
isCore.description: If true, this entry represents the base game rather than a paid expansion.

primaryColor.label: Primary color
primaryColor.description: Brand color for this expansion, used in UI accents. Accepts integer (0-255) components as (r, g, b). Defaults to white (255, 255, 255).
